hello.headline: Build the part that matters.
hello.lede: Semitexa is a modular PHP framework built around clear application boundaries, event-driven architecture, and a Swoole-first runtime. This starter page now speaks the same visual language as Semitexa Demo while still rendering through the Payload → Handler → Resource → Twig pipeline.
hello.learn_more: Would you like to know more?
hello.guide_title: A pre-demo that already feels like the real demo.
hello.guide_body: This module is meant to ship with the framework and create an immediate Semitexa Demo-level first impression. Keep the structure, replace the story, and expand from here.
hello.demo_hint_local: Semitexa Demo was detected in this installation, so the CTA opens your local /demo experience.
hello.demo_hint_remote: Semitexa Demo is not installed in this project, so the CTA points to the official hosted showcase.
hello.deferred_body: These cards are rendered as deferred template slots and arrive a bit later on purpose, so you can watch Semitexa KISS stream the UI into the page without breaking the shared visual system.
hello.panel1_body: Start in src/modules/Hello and treat this page as a living reference for Semitexa module structure.
hello.panel2_body: Replace the demo copy, wire your own payloads, and let the Swoole-first architecture stay out of your way.
hello.panel3_body: Once the first page is clear, duplicate the pattern for features, slots, and domain-specific workflows.
